title: Wealth from Above: Estimating Household Asset Wealth Across 22 Sub-Saharan African Countries from Satellite Imagery, 2017-2024
description: Replication code for an MSc Economics thesis (BI Norwegian Business School, 2026) that fuses multispectral Landsat 8/9 imagery and VIIRS nighttime lights through a ResNet-18 network to predict cluster-level DHS asset wealth across 22 African countries, and benchmarks the result against Meta's Relative Wealth Index on identical DHS clusters. Code is MIT-licensed; DHS-derived data are not redistributed (see DATA.md).
